calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of ADULT & 4 Minors.
Dept. 514, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. WILLIS-MCGHEE, CSR: G. CASEY, #8098

Petitioner KHALID I. ALHAJ was present in pro per FOR SELF AND as Guardian ad Litem for the minors RAWAN, AMANIE, IZZALDIN, MUHAMMAD KHALID ALHAJ
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
MINOR'S MOTHER ARWA A. DAWOUD ALSO PRESENT IN COURT & NOT OBJECTED TO NAME CHANGE OF MINORS
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
COURT GRANTS PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF ADULT TO KHALID IZZAT ALLAWZI.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to RAWAN, AMANIE, IZZALDIN, MUHAMMAD KHALID ALLAWZI.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
